commit.message:
Add documentation build and accuracy verification tests (#174)

Add 14 integration tests that verify documentation accuracy:

1. Rustdoc: key crates have crate-level doc comments (//!)
2. README: CLI commands reference valid wheelctl subcommands
3. ADR format: all ADRs match template (required sections, headers,
   title format, status lifecycle, date format, sequential numbering)
4. Cross-references: all relative links in docs/ and README.md point
   to existing files
5. CLI help: README documents core wheelctl commands, CLI source
   defines documented command variants
6. Public types: all workspace crates with lib.rs have crate-level docs
7. Doc attributes: no mixed #[doc=] and /// in the same file,
   crate-level docs use //! not #![doc=]

Also fixes a broken cross-reference in docs/PLUGIN_DEVELOPMENT.md
(../CONTRIBUTING.md → CONTRIBUTING.md) found by the new tests.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: handle SyncTrigger timeout in Flex Consumption deployment workflow

The az functionapp deployment source config-zip command exits with code 1
when [Kudu-SyncTriggerStep] times out on private VNet deployments. The
package is uploaded successfully but the workflow fails unnecessarily.

Changes:
- Allow zip deploy step to continue on SyncTrigger failure (|| echo)
- Add explicit 'Sync Function Triggers' step via Azure REST API
  (POST .../syncfunctiontriggers) which works through the management plane
  rather than the Kudu endpoint, bypassing the VNet restriction

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test(service): add comprehensive wheeld lifecycle tests (#173)

Add 60 integration tests for the service (wheeld) lifecycle covering:

1. Service initialization and configuration loading (10 tests)
2. Graceful shutdown on signal (6 tests)
3. State persistence across restart (5 tests)
4. Multiple concurrent client connections (5 tests)
5. Health check / liveness probe behavior (8 tests)
6. Error recovery (corrupted state, missing config) (10 tests)
7. Resource cleanup on shutdown (6 tests)
8. Service status reporting (10 tests)

Tests cover ServiceDaemon, WheelService, IpcServer, SystemConfig,
ProfileService persistence, safety state machine transitions,
broadcast channel lifecycle, and concurrent access patterns.

All tests use Result-returning test functions with no unwrap()/expect().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: harden against crash vectors found by chaos testing

Added 12 chaos tests exercising crash vectors, and fixed 6 production
code issues they uncovered:

Fixes:
- NaN/Inf guard in estimate_text_height: non-finite or non-positive
  font_size/wrap_width now fall back to sane defaults instead of
  propagating NaN through height calculations and viewport culling.
- Span bounds clamping in build_layout_job and render_text_with_links:
  span.start/end are now clamped to text.len(), preventing index-OOB
  panics from malformed spans.
- u32 saturation in StyledText::push_text: text offsets and char_count
  now saturate at u32::MAX instead of silently wrapping on >4GB strings.
- Render depth limit (MAX_RENDER_DEPTH=128): render_blocks bails at
  depth 128 to prevent stack overflow from pathologically nested
  blockquotes/lists.
- Non-finite scroll offset guard in show_scrollable: NaN/Inf scroll_y
  values are ignored instead of being passed to egui.

Chaos tests cover: deep nesting (500 levels), NaN/Inf float inputs,
empty tables with 0 columns, unclosed code fences, large list inputs,
u32 saturation, and out-of-bounds span offsets.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix thread-safety bugs in PaperTradingService and DynamicConfigurationService

- PaperTradingService.UpdateMetrics: Wrap all metric writes inside
  lock(_accountLock) to prevent torn reads when other threads read
  metrics concurrently. Sub-method calls (CalculateMaxDrawdown,
  CalculateStreaks, CalculateBestPerformers, UpdateInstrumentMetrics)
  are also covered by the lock scope.

- DynamicConfigurationService.ApplyOptimizedParametersAsync: Wrap
  early-validation profile mutations (daily limit reset, cooldown
  metrics, degradation counter) inside _writeLock to prevent races
  with LearnFromTradeAsync. Also protect the no-changes else branch.

- RollbackToBestPerformanceAsync is now transitively protected by
  the caller's _writeLock; added doc comment noting this requirement.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(portal): restore pointer cursor (#12436)

Tailwind v4 no longer applies the `pointer` cursor as the default for
buttons, so we need an explicit global rule to restore this.

---

Related:
https://tailwindcss.com/docs/upgrade-guide#buttons-use-the-default-cursor

---------

Signed-off-by: Jamil <jamilbk@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:

commit.message:
debug: disable FW version stamp — suspected infinite reboot loop

The FW stamp code calls bdb_resetLocalAction() which triggers SystemReset().
If NV item 0x0408 is being erased during the reset (by ZCD_STARTOPT_DEFAULT_NETWORK_STATE
processing), the stamp never persists and the device reboots forever.

Temporarily disabled to restore basic functionality.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Auto-QA checks: color contrast, bundle analysis, large file detection

* Initial plan

* ✨ Add Auto-QA checks for color contrast, bundle analysis, large files, and import cost

Implements the NFR improvement recommendations from the weekly Auto-QA
self-improvement analysis issue:

Accessibility (A11y focus day):
- New focus_color_contrast step: detects text-gray-200/300 classes likely
  failing WCAG AA 4.5:1, opacity-reduced text (<60%), and inline color
  styles that bypass the design system

Performance (Performance focus day):
- New focus_bundle_analysis step: flags JS chunks over 300KB in built
  assets, shows top-10 largest assets and summary stats
- New focus_large_files step: flags TS/TSX source files over 500 lines
  as refactoring candidates
- New focus_import_cost step: detects namespace imports (import * as)
  and full lodash imports that prevent tree-shaking

Supporting changes:
- 4 new GitHub labels: auto-qa:color-contrast, auto-qa:bundle-size,
  auto-qa:large-files, auto-qa:import-cost
- New env vars wired into the Create issues step
- Issue creation logic for each new finding with actionable fix guidance
- Self-improvement analysis recommendations updated to suggest the next
  tier of checks now that these are implemented

commit.message:
fix: enable timer monitor for reliable daily cache refresh on Flex Consumption

use_monitor=False disabled the singleton blob lease that the Azure Functions
runtime uses to track schedule state. On Flex Consumption (scales to zero),
without this lease the runtime has no persistent record of the timer schedule
and cannot reliably wake the app to fire the trigger — resulting in the daily
refresh_sku_cache never executing.

Setting use_monitor=True restores the blob lease, ensuring the timer fires
reliably even after cold starts or app restarts.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(auth): hidratación del authStore centralizada en app.js via data-auth-user

- Sidebar: openMenus inicializa con todos los grupos abiertos (no requiere async)
- Topbar/Sidebar: eliminada llamada API a /api/v1/user (ya no necesaria)
- AdminDashboardController: añade authUserJson al view

commit.message:
fix: enable nonce validation for both B2B and B2C

CIAM (External ID) DOES support nonce in id_tokens (claims_supported
includes 'nonce'). The earlier assumption that it doesn't was wrong —
the original 401 was caused by issuer URL mismatch.

Without validateNonce=true, EasyAuth skips setting the Nonce cookie
entirely, which causes 401 on the callback POST.

Verified: OIDC discovery confirms nonce support, login redirect now
sets Nonce cookie, CIAM login page loads with 200.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  onAgeChanged callback that calls ageBandNotifier.setAge(age)

feat(supabase): add profile_technologies junction table (Phase 1) (#3756)

Creates the `profile_technologies` many-to-many junction table to
decouple profile↔technology relationships from the `technologies` table
itself. Phase 1 only — `technologies.profile_id` and
`technologies.sort_order` are intentionally preserved for Phase 2
cleanup.

## Migration (`20260305000001_add_profile_technologies.sql`)

- **Schema**: `id` UUID PK, `profile_id` FK→`profiles`, `technology_id`
FK→`technologies`, `sort_order`, timestamps
- **Constraints**: composite `UNIQUE (profile_id, technology_id)`;
separate indexes on `profile_id` and `technology_id`
- **Data migration**: bulk-inserts from existing `technologies` rows via
`INSERT ... SELECT`
- **RLS**: SELECT open to all; INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE restricted to
profile owners via `EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM profiles WHERE
profiles.user_id = auth.uid())` — matches existing pattern
- **Trigger**: `update_updated_at_column()` wired on UPDATE

## Seed (`seed.sql`)

Adds five `profile_technologies` rows mirroring the existing test
technologies (UUIDs `…0031`–`…0035`), with `ON CONFLICT (profile_id,
technology_id) DO UPDATE` for idempotent reseeding.

## Types (`packages/supabase/src/database.types.ts`)

Adds `profile_technologies` Row/Insert/Update/Relationships definitions
in alphabetical table order.

<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> 
> ----
> 
> *This section details on the original issue you should resolve*
> 
> <issue_title>[technologies] 中間テーブルの追加 (Phase 1)</issue_title>
> <issue_description>## 概要
> 
> Epic Issue: https://github.com/ykzts/ykzts/issues/3746
> リクエスト者: @ykzts
> 
> `profile_technologies` 中間テーブルを新規作成し、既存データを移行する。この段階では既存の
`technologies.profile_id` および `technologies.sort_order` カラムはまだ削除しない。
> 
> ## タスク
> 
> ### マイグレーションファイルの作成
> 
> - `supabase/migrations/` に新規マイグレーションファイルを作成
> - `profile_technologies` テーブルを以下のカラム構成で作成:
>   - `id`: UUID、PRIMARY KEY
>   - `profile_id`: FK → `profiles`
>   - `technology_id`: FK → `technologies`
>   - `sort_order`: INTEGER
>   - タイムスタンプカラム
> - `(profile_id, technology_id)` に複合ユニーク制約を追加
> - `profile_id` と `technology_id` それぞれにインデックスを作成
> 
> ### 既存データの移行
> 
> - `INSERT INTO profile_technologies SELECT` を使って既存の
`profile_id`、`id`（technology_id として）、`sort_order` を移行
> 
> ### RLS ポリシーの設定
> 
> - `profile_technologies` テーブルで RLS を有効化
> - SELECT ポリシー: 全ユーザーに読み取りを許可
> - INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE ポリシー: `EXISTS` サブクエリで `profiles.user_id =
auth.uid()` を検証（既存パターンに準拠）
> 
> ### シードデータの更新
> 
> - `supabase/seed.sql` に `profile_technologies` テーブルへの INSERT 文を追加
> 
> ## 関連
> 
> - Epic: ykzts/ykzts#3746
> - 次フェーズ: Phase 2 (実装の変更)</issue_description>

commit.message:
fix: show Linux/Windows OS label on target SKU pricing fields

Hourly Cost and Monthly Cost labels in the target SKU box now reflect
the currently selected OS toggle (e.g. 'Hourly Cost (Linux)' /
'Hourly Cost (Windows)'). The box is re-rendered on toggle via the
existing displayTargetSku() call in updatePricingDisplay().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix 5 thread-safety and concurrency bugs in Data/Engine layers

- PrecomputedIndicatorRepository: Add DbContextWriteLock to write operations
  (BulkUpsert, Delete, DeleteOutdated) to prevent SQLite BUSY errors
- TradeEventRepository: Add lock acquisition around all read methods and
  CancellationToken parameters for shared DbContext thread-safety
- CloudTrainingOrchestrator: Replace Dictionary with ConcurrentDictionary
  for thread-safe provider/config storage in singleton service
- AutoMLService: Replace non-thread-safe Random with Random.Shared,
  protect _tpeObservations list with existing _trialHistoryLock
- CapitalComWebSocketService: Add volatile to _autoReconnectEnabled
  for cross-thread visibility in background reconnect loops

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(transpiler): add restructure pass with for/do-while/if-else detection

Improve asm68k-to-c output readability with structured control flow:
- DBRA-style counted loops → for() with MOVEQ format support
- Backward goto patterns → do { } while() loops
- Forward branch-over-block → if() blocks
- If/goto-else/goto-end → proper if/else blocks
- Brace-balance safety prevents malformed nesting
- MOVEM push/pop now multi-line for readability

Sonix driver: gotos reduced 808→622 (23%), gained 11 for-loops,
33 do-while, 15 if-else, 653 if-blocks.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
perf: cache char_count/has_links in StyledText, optimize height estimation

Performance optimizations targeting the hot render path:

1. StyledText: cache char_count (u32) and has_links (bool) during parse.
   Eliminates O(n) chars().count() in estimate_text_height for non-ASCII
   text, and O(spans) linear scan in render_styled_text_ex.

2. estimate_styled_height: new helper that uses cached char_count,
   skipping UTF-8 character counting entirely for pre-parsed blocks.
   Falls back gracefully when cache is unpopulated (char_count=0).

3. ensure_heights: use resize() instead of clear()+reserve() to
   reuse existing Vec allocations across font-size/zoom changes.

4. push_text: maintains char_count and has_links incrementally
   during parse with zero additional allocation overhead.

All 302 tests pass. No rendering changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix 5 Blazor Server bugs: DI scoping, timer race, list safety, thread-safety, ConfigureAwait

- TradingBackgroundService: create DI scope in RunProphecyCycleAsync to avoid resolving scoped services from root provider
- ProphecyPage: add _isLoading guard in auto-refresh timer to prevent concurrent prophecy generation
- PaperTradingPage: defensive copy of OpenTrades with .ToList() to prevent collection-modified exceptions
- ToastService: add lock around _toasts list operations and replace ContinueWith with proper async
- EinstellungenPage: remove .ConfigureAwait(false) to preserve Blazor sync context

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
